name: Shrimp Provencal
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Medium to large FRESH shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy skillet, sauté onion in oil over medium-high heat until tender but not browned.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, water, pepper, basil, oregano, salt, and garlic powder. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 and 1/2 hours.
4. Just before serving, sauté the shrimp in only as much butter as needed until barely tender.
5. Add wine and cook over high heat until the wine is almost evaporated.
6. To serve, place cooked thin pasta on a platter or pasta plate. Pour some of the shrimp cooking liquid over and toss.
7. Top with some of the sauce and then some of the shrimp.
